Gallery

March 31, 2026

UTA Symposium 2026 — ReRhythm Demo Day

Presented ReRhythm to judges and won 2nd runner-up at the UTA AWS Competition.

August 31, 2025

UTA College of Business Promo Video

Selected by faculty to represent the department in a college-wide video campaign.
